start_message: Welcome to V2Ray Bot! Please select your language to continue.
language_updated: 🌍 Your language has been successfully changed to English.
help_message:
Here are the available commands:

/start - Start the bot
/help - Show this help message
/accounts - Manage your accounts
/buy - Purchase a VPN subscription
/status - Check your account status
/change_location - Change server location
/settings - Customize your preferences
/support - Get support
/notifications - Manage notifications
/language - Change language
welcome:
Hello {0}! 👋
Welcome to MoonVPN Bot.
Please select an option from the menu below:
welcome_back:
Welcome back {0}! 👋
Please select an option from the menu below:
accounts_menu_with_accounts:
Account Management

You currently have {count} active accounts. What would you like to do?
accounts_menu_no_accounts:
Account Management

You don't have any accounts yet. Create one to get started!
subscription_plans_header:
🏷️ **Subscription Plans**

The following plans are available for purchase:
no_plans_available: No subscription plans available at the moment. Please check back later.
plan_not_found: Selected plan not found. Please try again.
no_servers_available: No servers available at the moment. Please check back later.
select_server_header:
**Select your server**

You have selected the *{plan_name}* plan:
• Duration: {duration} days
• Traffic: {traffic} GB
• Price: {price} {currency}

Now please select your preferred server:
selection_error: An error occurred during selection. Please try again.
insufficient_balance_error: Your balance is insufficient for this purchase. Please top up your account first.
balance_update_error: Error updating balance. Please try again.
account_creation_error: Error creating account. Please try again.
purchase_success:
✅ **Purchase Successful!**

*{plan_name}* account on *{server_name}* server was successfully created.

Account ID: `{account_id}`
Expiry date: {expiry_date}
Traffic: {traffic} GB

Your new balance: {new_balance} {currency}

You can view your account configuration using the buttons below.
error_general: An error occurred. Please try again.
zarinpal_not_implemented: Zarinpal payment is not available at the moment. Please use another method.
send_receipt: After payment, please send the transaction ID or receipt.
transaction_creation_error: Error creating transaction. Please try again.
admin_verification_required: Your payment is waiting for admin verification. Once approved, your account will be created automatically.
payment_rejected:
❌ *Payment Rejected*

Unfortunately, your payment of {amount} {currency} with ID {transaction_id} was not approved by the admin.

If you think there's been a mistake, please contact support.
payment_approved_subscription:
✅ *Payment Approved*

Your payment of {amount} {currency} was successful.

Your subscription for "{plan_name}" plan on "{server_name}" server has been activated.

Account ID: `{account_id}`
Expiry Date: {expiry_date}

Use the buttons below to view account details and get the configuration.
payment_already_processed:
❗️ *Payment Already Processed*

This transaction has already been approved or rejected.
payment_already_rejected:
❗️ *Payment Already Rejected*

This transaction has already been rejected.
transaction_not_found:
❗️ *Transaction Not Found*

The specified transaction was not found in the system.
user_not_found:
❗️ *User Not Found*

The specified user was not found in the system.
no_accounts: You don't have any accounts yet. Create one to get started!
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
delete_error: Error deleting account. Please try again.
monitoring_menu_info:
Server Monitoring

Select an option to view detailed statistics:
server_traffic_item:
Server: {name}
Upload: {up} GB
Download: {down} GB
Total: {total} GB
total_traffic_stats:
📈 Total Traffic
Upload: {up} GB
Download: {down} GB
Total: {total} GB
no_servers: No servers found. Please add servers through the admin panel.
no_tickets: You don't have any support tickets.
enter_ticket_message: Please enter your message for the support ticket:
ticket_error: Error creating ticket. Please try again.
reply_error: Error sending reply. Please try again.
close_error: Error closing ticket. Please try again.
notifications_menu:
Notification Settings

Expiry notification: {expiry_days} days before expiry
Traffic alert: {traffic_threshold}% usage
enter_expiry_days: Enter the number of days before expiry to receive notifications (1-30):
enter_traffic_threshold: Enter the traffic usage percentage to receive notifications (1-100):
invalid_expiry_days: Please enter a number between 1 and 30.
invalid_traffic_threshold: Please enter a number between 1 and 100.
account_expiring_soon: ⚠️ Account #{account_id} will expire in {days_left} days. Please renew it to continue using the service.
high_traffic_usage: ⚠️ Account #{account_id} has used {usage_percent}% of its traffic allocation. Consider upgrading or renewing your plan.
error_unauthorized: You are not authorized to use this bot. Please contact support.
error_timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
enter_amount: Enter the amount to pay (in Toman):
confirm_payment: Please confirm your payment of {amount} Toman
payment_success: Payment successful! Your account has been updated.
payment_pending: Payment is pending verification. We'll notify you once it's confirmed.
payment_failed: Payment failed. Please try again or contact support.
no_payments: You don't have any payment history.
payment_menu_info:
🏦 Payment Management

💰 Wallet Balance: {balance} Toman
📋 Number of Transactions: {transactions}

What would you like to do?
card_payment_info:
💳 Card to Card Payment

Please select an amount or enter a custom amount.

Card Information:
Card Number: `{card_number}`
Card Holder: *{card_holder}*
Bank: {bank_name}
amount_too_small: The amount entered is less than the minimum allowed ({min_amount} Toman).
amount_too_large: The amount entered is more than the maximum allowed ({max_amount} Toman).
no_transactions: 📋 You haven't made any transactions yet.
zarinpal_payment_link:
🛒 Online Payment of {amount} {currency}

Please click the button below to be redirected to the Zarinpal payment gateway. After completing the payment, press the 'Verify Payment' button to check the transaction status.
payment_creation_error: ❌ Error creating payment. Please try again or contact support.
buy_intro:
🚀 **Purchase a VPN Account**

Thank you for choosing MoonVPN! Start your secure browsing experience by selecting from our premium subscription plans or add funds to your account.
status_header:
📊 **Account Status Overview**

You have {count} active VPN account(s):
buy_suggestion: Would you like to purchase a subscription?
change_location_header:
🌎 **Change Server Location**

Select an account to change its server location:
no_other_servers_available: No other servers available. You're currently using the only available server.
select_new_server_header:
**Select New Server**

You're changing the server for account *{account_name}*

Current server: *{current_server}*

Please select a new server:
confirm_location_change:
**Confirm Location Change**

You're about to change the server for account *{account_name}*

From: *{current_server}*
To: *{new_server}*

Do you want to continue?
location_change_note: ⚠️ Note: Changing server location will interrupt your connection. You'll need to update your configuration and reconnect after this change.
location_change_success:
✅ **Server Changed Successfully**

Your account *{account_name}* has been moved to *{server}*.
reconnect_instructions: Please get the new configuration and update your client to reconnect.
location_change_error: ❌ Failed to change server. Please try again later.
server_not_found: Selected server not found. Please try again.
settings_header:
⚙️ **User Settings**

Here you can customize your experience with MoonVPN bot.
disable_notifications_question: Would you like to disable notifications?
enable_notifications_question: Would you like to enable notifications?
